hitbox_guidance: Tower body collider only; magnetic radius is separate non-collision gameplay zone.
Fan machine body collider only; wind zone separate.
Frame collider plus press-head damage collider only.
Collide only with visible bridge surface and mount body.
Pillar colliders always active; beam collider only when visible and narrow.
Collider follows visible arm and saw tip; not full frame.
Collider on hammer head and optionally rod/chain.
Landing/delivery zone should match visible deck only.
